headline: KKR Adds Sports Franchise Exposure Through Arctos Buyout
summary: KKR closes Arctos acquisition, adding sports franchise investing and GP solutions to expand its private markets platform.

headline: KKR Shares Slip as Weak ANI Outlook Overshadows Q1 Earnings Beat
summary: KKR tops Q1 earnings estimates as AUM and fee income surge, but shares slip after management lowers visibility on reaching $7-per-share ANI.
